mechanics.excerpt: DropShlp Fllght DropShips are the only vehicles that can transport pas sengers and/or cargo out of planetary orbit to other places in star System; such as t0 moon jump point . Inter-System Travel Characters looking to travel different star system will need t0 book passage on DropShip that has similarly booked travel with JumpShip.
